name: Cat Simulator
author: Poki
description: Cat Simulator is an adorable game where you play as a mischievous little cat! Explore cozy rooms, interact with all kinds of objects, pull playful pranks, and knock things over just for fun. Jump around, collect stars, and unlock new rooms to continue your curious adventure. Ready to cause some cute chaos? How to play Cat Simulator? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Jump: the space bar Who created Cat Simulator? Cat Simulator is created by Critters Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Merge Zoo and Critters Quest ! How can I play Cat Simulator for free? You can play Cat Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Cat Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Cat Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
